# Playwright Helper for Pi

This is a helper skill. For user-facing E2E work, route to `testing-e2e`.

## Path Resolution

Before running commands, determine this skill directory from where this
`SKILL.md` was loaded. Common Pi deployment path:

```text
~/.pi/agent/skills/playwright-skill
```

Use `$SKILL_DIR` for commands below.

## Setup

```bash
cd "$SKILL_DIR"
npm install
npx playwright install chromium
```

## Detect Dev Servers

```bash
cd "$SKILL_DIR" && node -e "require('./lib/helpers').detectDevServers().then(s => console.log(JSON.stringify(s)))"
```

If multiple servers are found, ask the user which one to test.

## Run Temporary Browser Script

Write scripts outside the skill directory, usually under `/tmp`:

```bash
cd "$SKILL_DIR" && node run.js /tmp/playwright-check.js
```

## Rules

- Do not write generated tests into the skill directory.
- Prefer visible browser mode unless the user asks for headless.
- Parameterize target URLs.
- Return artifacts paths for screenshots, traces, or logs.
- Keep the higher-level test strategy in `testing-e2e`.
